roleList.hint: Manage roles, permission scope, and user assignments.
roleList.tableHint: Filter roles by name, code, and type.
roleList.emptyDescription: No data matches the current filters. Clear filters or create a new record.
roleList.permissionLoadFailed: Failed to load the permission catalog. Showing roles only.
roleList.permissionUnavailable: No permission catalog is available for this session.
roleList.copySuccess: Role copied as a custom role
roleList.copyPermissionsPartialSuccess: Role created, but permission copy failed. Assign permissions from the role list.
roleList.copyUnavailable: This role cannot be copied right now. Confirm the permission catalog is loaded and you can create roles and assign permissions.
roleList.copyLoadFailed: Failed to load the source role permissions before copying
roleList.moreCustomHint: Additional role actions are not available yet

lifecycle.deleteReady: This custom role now satisfies the delete lifecycle rules.
lifecycle.deleteNeedsDisable: Disable this custom role before deleting it.
lifecycle.deleteNeedsBindingsCleared: Remove all user and permission bindings before deleting this role.

toolbar.searchPlaceholder: Search role name, display name, or role code

form.systemProtectionBody: This role is built into the system to keep platform baseline functions working.
form.systemProtectionNormal: This is a normal protection limit, not an abnormal state. Deleting, changing the code, or adjusting permissions is not supported.
form.systemProtectionCopyHint: To customize the permission set, copy it as a custom role and edit that role.
form.name: Role Code

permissionDialog.title: Manage Role Permissions
permissionDialog.headerDescription: Choose the permissions this role should grant.
permissionDialog.operationHelp: Overwrite Current Permissions replaces the role's current permissions with the current selection. Append Selected Permissions Only adds only the permissions selected this time. Remove Selected Permissions removes only the already assigned permissions selected this time.
permissionDialog.readonlyHelp: System role permissions are maintained by the system. This mode only supports expanding, searching, and reading permission details.
permissionDialog.readonlyProtectionBody: This system role's permissions are maintained by the system and can only be viewed. To customize the permission set, copy it as a custom role and edit that role.
permissionDialog.readonlyFooterDetail: Readonly mode will not save permission changes.
permissionDialog.readPermissionRequired: Permission read access is required before viewing permission details.
permissionDialog.searchPlaceholder: Search permission code, name, or description
permissionDialog.selectionLoadFailed: Failed to load the current role permissions. Retry before saving.
permissionDialog.selectionUnavailable: The current role permissions are unavailable, so overwrite save is blocked.
permissionDialog.unsavedChangesConfirm: Current permission changes have not been saved. If discarded, this selection adjustment will not take effect.

permissionList.hint: Review system permissions, module ownership, and authorization usage.
permissionList.tableHint: Filter permissions by name, code, and module.
permissionList.emptyFilteredDescription: No permissions match the current filters. Clear filters and try again.
permissionList.readonlyNotice: This permission list is currently read only.
permissionList.readonlyDescription: Permissions are registered by the system and modules. This page shows permission points and module ownership.
permissionList.factSourceHint: Search for codes like `user.create` here to verify whether the permission is actually registered and how many roles currently use it.

userDisable.description: Allows disabling or deleting managed users.

userSessionRead.description: Allows reading active refresh sessions for a specified user.

userSessionRevoke.description: Allows revoking refresh sessions for a specified user.

roleDelete.description: Allows deleting custom roles that satisfy the lifecycle requirements.

monitorServerStatusRead.description: Allows reading the server status overview.

moduleRuntimeRead.description: Allows reading the core module runtime snapshot.

accessLogRead.description: Allows reading canonical access-log explorer data.

appLogRead.description: Allows reading logger-owned app-log explorer data.

systemConfigRead.description: Allows reading registered system configuration definitions and effective values.

systemConfigWrite.description: Allows writing and resetting administrator configuration overrides.

scheduledTaskRead.description: Allows reading scheduled task runtime data and run history.

scheduledTaskCreate.description: Allows creating user-managed scheduled task instances.

scheduledTaskDelete.description: Allows deleting user-managed scheduled task instances.

scheduledTaskRun.description: Allows manually running scheduled task runtime jobs.

scheduledTaskEnable.description: Allows enabling and disabling scheduled tasks.

auditRead.description: Allows viewing the audit overview and audit logs.
